Test Case Title: Create a new account and verify login
Description: End-to-end flow: register a new customer, log out, log in with the same credentials, and confirm the account balance is visible on the dashboard.
Preconditions: Parabank application is reachable; Chromium browser is installed; automation framework dependencies are installed.
Test Data: First name: John; Last name: Doe; Address: 221B Baker Street; City: Springfield; State: California; ZIP: 90210; Phone: 5551234567; SSN: 123-45-6789; Username and password are generated randomly per run.
Expected Result: User is registered successfully, can log in after logout, and account balance is displayed (currency format, e.g. $515.50). Screenshot saved to proofs/balance.png.
BDD Scenario: Create a new account and verify login
Evidence: Screenshot: proofs/balance.png; Video: videos/; Report: cucumber-report.html
